programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary (Melissa Sue Anderson) needs an immediate operation, so Charles (Michael Landon) leaves the farm for a dangerous high-paying job.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles (Michael Landon) risks his life and the lives of his crew by rushing a tunnel-dynamiting job. With Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A black boy (guest star Todd Bridges) enslaves himself to the Ingallses in exchange for an education. With Michael Landon and Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nightmares plague Laura (Melissa Gilbert) after she steals a small toy. With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle and Melissa Sue Anderson.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The boys want to prove that a slow-witted classmate can beat Mary and Nellie for class president.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When heavy rains make it impossible to plant their crops, the Ingalls and Edwards families head west to search for gold.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles (Michael Landon) regrets uprooting his family to the camps until he gets gold fever. With Karen Grassle, Melissa Sue Anderson and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A lonely elderly woman tries to settle in Walnut Grove. With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle, Melissa Sue Anderson and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles and Mary (Michael Landon, Melissa Sue Anderson) take their first trip to Chicago. With Karen Grassle and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes after Laura (Melissa Gilbert) convinces a mother to let her daughter go swimming in the creek. With Michael Landon and Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Gossip flies about Caroline and a man (Gil Gerard) building her kitchen in exchange for room and board.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A pack of wild dogs, crazed with hunger, kills the livestock of Walnut Grove farmers. With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle, Melissa Sue Anderson and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After an unknown thief plagues Walnut Grove, Laura (Melissa Gilbert) and her friend investigate. With Michael Landon and Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Doc Baker (Kevin Hagen) decides to retire after a patient dies. With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle, Melissa Sue Anderson and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary (Melissa Sue Anderson) is held hostage by the outlaw Jesse James (guest star Dennis Rucker). With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an “International Fair” on the playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney, and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the children have fun playing with and learning about busses and cars.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Hip Hop Don't Stop
programme.desc: This film gives us the definitive chronicle of hip-hop from its beginnings. See the evolution of music with vintage footage, live performances, and exclusive interviews with hip hop legends

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: JESUS WALKS by Kanye West: In an era of excess, a Christian rap song challenges the church and changes its own ideals about religion and rap music.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: ALRIGHT by Kendrick Lamar: Making protest music in the era of Black Lives Matter, Alright becomes the unsaid anthem for hope.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: ROCK BOX by Run-DMC: How one song tore down the barriers between rock & hip hop, race and class on American radio and television.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: ELEVATORS by OutKast: Hip hop's southern voice breaks through with an unsuspecting song that redefines rap's cultural and geographic boundaries.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: THE BRIDGE by Marley Marl and MC Shan: A song designed to foster community pride, ignites hip hop's most epic rap battle.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: LADIES FIRST by Queen Latifah: At the height of hip hop's misogynistic themes, the culture bows down to their queens of rap.

programme.title: Keith Richards: Can't Rock Me
programme.desc: Keith Richards has smashed through the barriers of tradition for over 5 decades. He is the heart and the soul of The Rolling Stones, crafting some of their classic hits that have helped cement them into the history books. He has lived a life full of d...

programme.title: Janet Jackson: In Control
programme.desc: She may have been the youngest of 10 of the Jackson children, but that did not stop Janet Jackson from embracing her own identity. Her unquestioned talent has built an empire of success as Ms. Janet remains In Control.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Life, Death, and Legacy
programme.desc: In this film we take an intimate look into life of one of the worlds most successful entertainers of all time, a man dubbed as the King of Pop.

programme.title: The Story of James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown is one of the founders of funk music and is a major figure of 20th century music and dance. This program features interviews with the man himself, live performances, interviews with band members Bobby Byrd and Maceo Parker Jr.

programme.title: The Story of Jay-Z
programme.desc: Jay-Z is one of the most talented, successful and acclaimed musicians of all time. He changed the game and without him, music - and more specifically hip hop - would not be in the medium it is today.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Americans eat over three and a half billion pounds of chocolate each year--that's 12 pounds per person per year with annual sales topping $13 billion.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A 2000 Ford Taurus gets dissected to demonstrate the evolution of the automobile's major systems; automotive historians and experts describe how cars have evolved and explain major advances.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Since the turn of the 20th century, designers have competed to build them faster, taller, and steeper; as technology pushes the envelope with flips, weightlessness, and more g-force than a jet, they have to calculate how much can the human body take.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Examine tragedies including 1999 Milwaukee ironworkers' 200-foot fall, China's Sunjiwan coal mine explosion, fluoroscope x-ray radiation exposure in shoe stores, California's Salton Sea drainage issues, and Soviet Aral Sea irrigation disaster.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Emergency room medicine has only been a recognized specialty since 1989; episode examines advances that led to the modern emergency room - from the Byzantine's establishment of the first hospitals around 1050 A.D. to today's telemedicine.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From Sherlock Holmes' examination of the physical evidence at a crime scene to today's DNA technology, a review of the history of crime detection through the use of forensic science.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: More than two million people die in the U.S. annually, creating 5,500 daily burials with 80 percent choosing caskets and 20 percent cremation; explore dealing with death throughout centuries and today's $20-billion funeral industry.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A survey of torture devices employed throughout history, ranging from the ancient Greeks' Brazen Bull to the Spanish Inquisition's elaborate mechanisms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Tiny weapons may not sound impressive, but small can kill, and it can also be easily concealed; from a pocket pistol used by the police to a submachine gun wielded by a bodyguard, many of today's most effective weapons are smaller than ever.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Episode takes a look at the items found in peoples' pockets all across America; not cell phones, which everybody has, but more intimate items, personal things, both valuable and cheap.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: The butcher's craft is a fusion of knives and technology, old world skills and modern day tools.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Electrical linemen repair 345,000-volt power lines from helicopters as part of America's nearly two-century hardwiring story; fiber optic cables transmitting light since the late 1970s remain vital infrastructure alongside wireless technology.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Thomas Alva Edison, the Wizard of Menlo Park, created electric lights, power systems, motion pictures, recorded sound, and tattoo pens; his innovations evolved into modern CDs, iPods, satellite radio, and technologies from Internet to outer space.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Once the revolutionary force that galvanized global communications without wires, radio linked the world a century ago; explore this enduring medium's long evolution from communication breakthrough to today's presence.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The intense competition, the romance, the success and disappointment that led to the miracle of long distance communication.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá está muy ocupado para pasar tiempo con Timmy, entonces desea que "muchos papás" estén un momento con él. / Es una carrera entre Squirrely Scouts y Cream Puffs en la cima del Monte Doom.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Poof estuvo mirando un dibujo animado clásico. Y al ver a Vicky y a Timmy, Poof los convierte en el gato y el ratón. / Poof no quiere tomar su medicina y Crocker no quiere más las "F" de Timmy.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker quiere un heredero para su supuesta "fama y fortuna". Poof termina a su cuidado y Crocker se prepara para la vida. / Timmy destruye el Monte Olimpo y ahora todos los dioses griegos se quieren vengar de él.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy se convierte en una mosca para colarse en una película. / Cosmo y Wanda están muy ocupados con Poof. Y Timmy desea tener un hada temporal.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El Señor Crocker es hipnotizado para no creer más en los seres mágicos. Pero su creencia es la que le daba energía al Mundo Mágico / Cosmo se convierte en un superhéroe al salvar a Poof y es visto por todos los ciudadanos de Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Con un poco de ayuda de Timmy, los trucos mágicos de Papá realmente funcionan. Convencido de que el papá de Timmy es un padrino, Crocker sale a demostrarlo. / Timmy conoce a sus abuelos, quienes hacen una larga y aburrida fiesta en su casa.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de que rechazan a Timmy de la orquesta de la escuela, desea que a todos les guste su música / Timmy salva a Vicky de un horrible accidente e inesperadamente, la hieren por su generosidad.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Poof tiene la enfermedad del Pollo Zas, que convierte a todos en pollos de verdad. / Timmy se roba las flechas de Cupido para lograr que Trixie se enamore de él y vayan juntos al baile.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El hermano de Cosmo, Schnozmo, un espía ultrasecreto, hace una visita, pero se revela que no es más que un estafador. / Nadie quiere jugar con Poof, así que se escapa al único lugar donde es el centro de atención: el planeta Yugopotamia.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Es el día de "Con tu hijo a trabajar" y Papá lleva a Timmy a su oficina. / Cuando Timmy, sin querer, se come a Poof, Timmy se convierte en un talentoso en el futbolista.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: ¡Regresó Foop! Foop escapó de prisión y convenció a Cosmo y Wanda de que había cambiado y estaba listo para jugar con Poof. / Cuando Timmy desea ser la mascota del maestro, Poof toma su deseo de verdad.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A fierce argument over where Nami’s loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing’s for sure – no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.

programme.desc: Nami’s adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker’s younger days.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats arrive at Logue Town, and each crewmember embarks upon a mission of a more personal nature. While his crew shops, Luffy goes in search of sacred ground.

programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a wealthy woman with terminal cancer. Maura meets a man, but is torn between the doubts of her scientific mind and the instincts of her heart.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: While Maura is at a convention, Jane needs Susie's (TINA HUANG) help to solve a murder. Korsak is visited by the son of an old friend and forced to deal with unfinished business.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The murder of a rare bookseller brings Jane and Maura into the world of Keltic writings and coded confessions. Angela's relationship with Cavanaugh changes pace.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The team races against time to find a young witness to the contract killing of a woman outside of a nightclub. Jane puts herself in the line of fire.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Mummified remains of a woman put the team's investigative skills to the test. Jane works from her hospital room as she seeks to recover from a devastating loss.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The team helps Korsak investigate an old case. Jane refuses to believe that she's not ready to go back on duty and takes untraditional steps to stay involved.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: In the middle of a heat wave, Jane and Maura find a man who died suspiciously in a bathtub full of ice. Angela discovers a spicy tea with unexpected romantic consequences.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A notable county prosecutor is arrested for murder, but Jane begins to doubt he did it. Angela "educates" Maura about kids since Maura will meet Jack's (ENVER GJOKAJ) daughter.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Maura is terrified she has lost her best friend after Jane jumps from a bridge to save a prosecutor suspected of murder. The squad renews the search for the real killer.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: When a severed human foot washes up on shore, the squad is called in to identify the victim and track down the murderer. Angela finds she enjoys helping Korsak.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: The Way Of The Gun
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Triple 9
programme.desc: When a bank-robbing crew of corrupt cops and ex-Special Forces must attempt a nearly impossible heist for a ruthless mobster, their only hope of survival is to distract the entire Atlanta police force with a “999” — cop code for “officer down.”

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) is a professor leading a double life as a high-stakes gambler. When he borrows money from dangerous gangsters, he places the lives of his loved ones in mortal danger and must risk everything to keep from losing it all.

programme.title: Revolver
programme.desc: REVOLVER is populated with Guy Ritchie's (Snatch; Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels) classic breed of fast-talking, sharp-suited gangsters but with a psychological twist that your mind may not be able to handle.

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler (Adam Sandler) makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Man Who Fell To Earth

programme.title: The War of the Worlds (1953)

programme.title: The Beast With A Million Eyes

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum (1961)

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory
programme.desc: Before the sneak attack on Pearl Harbor, the Japanese initiate the Pacific War by firing on the British in Malaya. Their route to the rubber-rich nation takes them into Singapore, the World's most armed fortress.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory
programme.desc: During a two-hour surprise attack on the American Pacific fleet anchored at Pearl Harbor, Japanese navy pilots score a near-complete victory.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: All of the Greek kings and their armies have responded to Agamemnon's call. All except two, that is, Odysseus and Achilles.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Hart Of Dixie

programme.title: Hart Of Dixie

programme.title: Hart Of Dixie
programme.desc: George and Zoe play Romeo and Juliet. Lemon and Wade are excited about taking over the reins at the Rammer Jammer, but things come to a halt when they lose all the staff.

programme.desc: Rose (Mckaley Miller) and Max (Nicholas Podany) play matchmaker for Zoe. Rob Huebel (Childrens Hospital) guest stars as a potential love interest.

programme.title: Hart Of Dixie

programme.title: Nashville
programme.desc: Juliette takes great pains to keep Maddie from learning the truth. Deacon considers a new artist for Highway 65. Scarlett's pregnancy faces complications. Gunnar searches for the mugger.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers
programme.desc: After making a horrific discovery in the basement of a old church, Trish and her brother Darry watch their routine road trip home turn into a heart stopping race for their lives. They are now the chosen prey of a force that relentlessly pursues them.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis stars in this adaptation of Stephen King's classic tale of horror. Carrie White has been cursed with the power of telekinesis and when her tormenters commit an act of unforgivable humiliation, they'll soon learn a deadly lesson.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: After an accident on a winding road, four teens make the fatal mistake of dumping their victim's body into the sea. But exactly one year later, the dead man returns from his watery grave, and he's looking for more than an apology.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Remember Ben Willis? He's the fisherman who killed the boy who was driving the car when it went off the road in the fatal accident that killed his daughter, Sara... he's the man in the slicker with a hook in his hand... well, he's back.

programme.title: Disturbing Behavior
programme.desc: When the Clark Family moves from Chicago to Cradle Bay, Steve is cautioned by Gavin Strick about the separating factions at the local high school, where the Blue Ribbons, a club of robotic perfect students, rule.

programme.title: May
programme.desc: May grew up as a lonely oddball whose only friend was a perfectly kept doll. When she moves to L.A., she takes up with a handsome filmmaker and then an alluring lesbian, but every connection she makes turns out deadly.

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The hit Oscar-winning drama which launched the careers of Matt Damon and Ben Affleck tells the tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The hit Oscar-winning drama which launched the careers of Matt Damon and Ben Affleck tells the tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stuck In A Toilet
programme.desc: A woman is stuck for over 18 hours in a toilet bowl; doctors struggle to save the life of a man who's been mangled by a stump grinder; when a nurse collapses in the hospital, doctors and staff make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches & Zombies
programme.desc: A pregnant ER doctor is endangered by a seemingly invincible violent patient; an unexplained headache turns out to be life-threatening; a man with a fence post through his torso is brought into a busy ER in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twists & Turns
programme.desc: A violent convict may be faking paralysis as part of a prison escape plan; a young man seems to be suffocating for no apparent reason; a father is stabbed in the heart trying to protect his son; a college cheerleader mysteriously goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dumpster Smash
programme.desc: A man who's been smashed by a dumpster barely clings to life; an elderly nun and an inebriated, screaming prostitute come into the ER at the same time; a woman dying of an apparent stroke may be suffering from a rare disease.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: An off-duty ER physician diagnoses his own critical illness while en route to the hospital; a visiting ER doctor is threatened while working at a remote hospital; a patient with ominous symptoms returns to the ER multiple times after a scuba diving trip.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: A young woman is rushed to the ER after being bitten in the face by a dog; an ER doctor has to overcome his fears when he's confronted with an unusual series of patients; an intoxicated woman injured in a fall unexpectedly goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Frozen
programme.desc: Doctors struggle to save a young man brought to the ER frozen and pulseless; a man gets deathly ill while attending his own anniversary party; an embarrassing hidden secret prohibits a heart attack patient from being rushed to the OR for surgery.

programme.title: Hit By A Train
programme.desc: A mountain biker has multiple injuries and her boyfriend has multiple fainting spells; a man's legs are severed when he's run over by a train; a drunken bachelor helps reveal the secret of a mystery nurse that has been working in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: An alligator snapping turtle is clamped to a man's neck and won't let go; an ER physician races against an impending hurricane to clear the ER of patients before it hits; a tree trimmer is 20 feet above ground when he is impaled by his chainsaw.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Skewered Skydivers
programme.desc: Two skydivers, impaled by the same fence post, are rushed to the ER; multiple patrons from a dance club suddenly stop breathing and Dr. Jasper must determine the cause; a bride-to-be may miss her wedding after her finger gets stuck in a make-up jar.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A patient arrives with paralysis in her legs; a boy is crushed by an ATV and the hospital doesn't have the right equipment to treat him; a doctor accidentally injects herself with epinephrine.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I Hate Doctors
programme.desc: A hospital worker feels like she's dying, but doctors can find nothing wrong; a physician's young son is a patient in her own ER, demanding her attention while she's trying to treat others; a woman's hobby of wild mushroom picking sends her to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Shredded!
programme.desc: A man is rushed to the ER, apparently clawed by a tiger, but he won't reveal the real source of his injuries; a patient says he's been shot in the head, but the bullet is nowhere to be found; a woman is brain dead, but one doctor thinks she can be saved.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Why Am I Blue?
programme.desc: A man arrives in the ER with blue skin and the doctor has no idea what's causing it; a teenage girl has abdominal pains that doctors have been unable to diagnose for years; a doctor struggles to save the life of the only survivor of a plane crash.

programme.title: Weapons Race
programme.desc: For centuries men dreamed of machines which could win wars without slaughter on the ground. In today’s Northrop B-2A Spirit stealth bomber we seem to have reached this ideal.

programme.title: Weapons Race
programme.desc: From the moment the first German V-2 rocket exploded on London, the weapons race was on to develop more powerful strategic ballistic missiles with greater range, payload and accuracy.

programme.title: WW II in Color: US Army Air Forces
programme.desc: The outbreak of war in Europe forces the US to review its readiness for war.

programme.title: WW II in Color: US Army Air Forces
programme.desc: In the pacific, in Europe, and on the continents of Africa and Asia, every branch of the air services now forms close partnerships with the other branches of the armed forces.

programme.title: WW II in Color: US Army Air Forces
programme.desc: After 2 years of war, the ever-changing combat landscape around the world sees the USAAF scale up and level up, responding to the need for more air crews, better equipment, and improved transport.

programme.title: WW II in Color: US Army Air Forces
programme.desc: Hitler's fortress Europe begins to crumble with Nazi occupying forces fall back on every front.

programme.title: WW II in Color: US Army Air Forces
programme.desc: The continued dedication and bravery of the men and women of the air force brings about the collapse of the Third Reich and Germany's surrender.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: A nation shaped by war for thousands of years fights to overcome the oppression of foreign powers.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: Fighting the spread of 1950s communism has prepared America's new president to face new threats around the world. JFK must prevent countries from falling under its influence without going to war.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: The assassination of John F. Kennedy put a new leader in the driving seat of America's commitment to South Vietnam.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: The first major battle of the war takes place at Ia Drang. Colonel Hal Moore leads the 1st Cavalry Division against hardened North Vietnamese regulars.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The story of the formation of the Office of Strategic Services, the predecessor to the CIA. OSS agents played an important role in WWII.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII
programme.desc: Eastern and Western offensives of the Allied and Soviet armies in their way to Berlin. Operation Market Garden.

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII

programme.title: La novia de Estambul
programme.desc: Faruk y Adem, alarmados por la imprudencia de Fikret, unen fuerzas para encontrarlo y evitar otra tragedia.

programme.title: La novia de Estambul
programme.desc: İpek toma una decisión audaz que lo cambia todo para la familia.

programme.title: La novia de Estambul
programme.desc: La relación entre Faruk y Süreyya enfrenta una de sus pruebas más difíciles. Las consecuencias de la situación con Özgür los dejan luchando por comprenderse mutuamente.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tratando de rescatar a un banco local de Lapras de posibles cazadores, nuestros héroes deben hallar una forma de convencer a estos desconfiados Pokémon de que son amigos… ¡antes de que sea demasiado tarde!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con Pueblo Paleta en sus mentes, los chicos buscan un ferry, pero el puerto está abandonado... ¡excepto por unos Electrode explosivos! ¿Podrá Ash detener al Equipo Rocket antes de que el transbordador se llene de humo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash tiene un ajetreado regreso a casa con una sorpresiva visita de un viejo amigo, una visita para ver al Profesor Oak, y un ataque del Equipo Rocket. ¡No hay lugar como el hogar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de que Gary llega al rescate contra el Equipo Rocket, Ash aprovecha la oportunidad… Por fin, nuestro héroe reta a su rival a su primera batalla Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash comienza su viaje por Johto, una región ampliamente inexplorada y poblada por Pokémon nuevos para él y sus amigos.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: De nuevo de viaje, Ash y su Charizard derrotan por completo a una ambiciosa Entrenadora novata llamada Casey. Molesta, huye antes de que Ash pueda consolarla: ¡El momento perfecto para que el Equipo Rocket ataque!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un bosque que está siendo destruido por un furioso Pinsir, Ash debe enlistar la ayuda del Heracross local para proteger su hogar. Pero resulta que estos Pokémon se ven más rudos de lo que actúan…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia Ciudad Violeta , nuestros héroes llegan a un valle donde los Donphan suelen cosechar sus preciosas piedras. No hace falta decir que los villanos del Equipo Rocket no están lejos de ellos.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El bosque puede ser un lugar temible por la noche, ¡especialmente si estás perdido! Nuestros héroes necesitarán algo de ayuda para salir de este embrollo. ¡Hoothoot, al rescate!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su primera parada en una ciudad desde Pueblo New Bark, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a que la compañía de baile de un inseguro Bellossom recupere la confianza y participe en su próxima exhibición.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos llegan a un pueblo acechado por crímenes que imitan a un legendario ladrón maestro. La esperanza del pueblo yace en estos jóvenes Entrenadores... ¿Detendrán a este dúo criminal y a su Meowth cómplice?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando nuestros héroes devuelven a un infeliz Snubbull a su acaudalada Entrenadora, inicia una serie de eventos que cambiarán por siempre la vida del Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Brock descubre a un Stantler herido y asustado en un parque cercano, decide cuidarlo hasta curarlo. Pero con Jessie, James y Meowth tras ellos, ¿podrá mantener al Stantler a salvo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Aún en camino hacia Ciudad Violeta, Ash se encuentra con un Chikorita salvaje y trata de atraparlo. Chikorita demuestra ser un oponente más duro de lo que pensaba, y las cosas sólo empeoran con la llegada del Equipo Rocket…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El encargo del Profesor Oak de entregar la misteriosa Bola GS a un experto en Pokébolas es interrumpido cuando un Quagsire que gusta de los objetos redondos roba la Bola GS para un ritual nocturno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Durante otra emboscada del Equipo Rocket, un joven Entrenador y su Ledyba ayudan a nuestros héroes a derrotarlos. Pero, en medio del caos, su Ledyba se separa del grupo, ¿dónde podrá estar?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes paran a descansar en el Centro Pokémon, que es administrado por un amable pero confundido Blissey. Las cosas sólo empeoran cuando un viejo amigo de Blissey llega inesperadamente…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Llegando por fin a Ciudad Violeta, la búsqueda del Gimnasio de Ash es frenada por un viaje a la Academia Pokémon local. Ash interpreta bien su papel de maestro, ¡hasta que un alumno huye con Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Es hora de la primera batalla de Gimnasio de la Liga Johto de Ash, y él se siente confiado. Pero el Pokémon tipo Volador de Falkner demuestra ser un duro competidor. ¿Ganará Ash y obtendrá su primera medalla de Gimnasio?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras ganar su primera medalla de Gimnasio en Johto, Ash y sus amigos encuentran a un lindo Marill que no deja de llorar. Nada de lo que hacen nuestros héroes lo tranquiliza, y el ataque del Equipo Rocket de verdad no ayuda.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El último invento del Equipo Rocket será un éxito… ¡hasta que Togepi y su nuevo amigo Sentret se lo llevan de paseo!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash escucha de un lugar de entrenamiento para Charizard salvajes y decide que es el lugar para perfeccionar la fuerza de su Charizard. Pero las duras lecciones a aprender cambiarán la amistad de Ash y Charizard para siempre.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia el Gimnasio Azalea, nuestros héroes descubren un festival de Sunflora en un pueblo cercano y conocen a un Entrenador cuya Sunflora está demasiado triste para competir. ¿Podrán Ash y sus amigos alegrarla?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: A Ash se le está dificultando hacer que Chikorita lo obedezca, y la Enfermera Joy cree que se debe a celos por la amistad de Ash con Pikachu. ¿Podrá Ash probarle a Chikorita lo mucho que significa para él?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un Entrenador cuyos Hoppip pueden predecir el clima. Pero dos tormentas se acercan en el horizonte... ¡Y una de ellas se llama "Equipo Rocket"!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El legendario superhéroe Gligarman envejece y considera colgar su capa. Cuando Ash y sus amigos vagan por el pueblo, traen consigo un reto que podría ser su batalla final: ¡el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando una revoltosa horda de Mareep arruina sus planes de almuerzo, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a su tímido pastor, justo a tiempo para competir en un festival de batalla local.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante de un centro de entrenamiento Pokémon pierde su interés en las batallas Pokémon y prefiere construir una gran base de datos Pokémon, Ash debe convencerlo de que las batallas son más que probabilidad.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash encuentra un Cyndaquil salvaje, está ansioso por atraparlo… ¡pero pueden apostar que no es el único!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras llegar a Pueblo Azalea, Ash descuidadamente provoca a sus residentes, quienes adoran a SlowPoké. Y las cosas sólo empeoran cuando llega el Equipo Rocket, tratando de robar hasta al último SlowPoké. ¿Qué podrá hacer Ash?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tal como prometió al Profesor Oak, Ash entrega la misteriosa Bola GS a un renovado experto en Pokébolas. Pero el fruto de su trabajo casi se arruina cuando el Equipo Rocket aparece en escena.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash por fin llega al Gimnasio Azalea, pero Cyndaquil no tiene la energía para derrotar al Líder de Gimnasio. Conforme la batalla se enciende, Ash debe esforzarse al máximo para derrotar al poderoso Pokémon tipo Insecto.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: When a Hollywood camera crew set out to film an active volcano they end up in a helicopter crash into the active volcano. All rescue attempts are delayed by lava, toxic gases and bad weather.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Nearly all the buyers have it out for each other at an auction in Cedarbrae, ON. Cindy almost comes to blows with Ursula, who takes great pleasure in bidding up Roy, who does his best to give Paul and Bogart the worst advice ever.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Bogart finally snaps when Paul buys yet another lousy locker at an auction in Toronto’s Liberty Village.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart declare storage war on the veterans at an auction in Orillia. Roy bums a ride off them instead. Ursula has a bad hair day, and Rick and Cindy meet former Stanley Cup Champion Nick Kypreos.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy antagonizes the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans. Rick preaches caution, but Cindy goes for the big score.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage is up against it as they take on two back-to-back high-risk emergency operations.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: After 152 years, the Money Pit may no longer be lost.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the swamp may be man-made on a scale the team never could have anticipated.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Excitement abounds when Gary uncovers what could be a "friend of the cross."

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: With a dangerous hurricane approaching, the team scrambles to find evidence of what might be buried beneath the swamp before the storm can wipe out their efforts.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: New evidence suggests there was French activity on Oak Island decades before the discovery of the Money Pit and the team may have finally uncovered definitive proof the swamp was manmade centuries ago.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960s and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Pawn

programme.title: Beverly Hills Pawn
programme.desc: On this episode of Beverly Hills Pawn, Yossi and Cory are wow’d by a Thor Hammer prop from the blockbuster movie "The Avengers". Then, Yossi and Aria visit actor Eric Roberts to sell him a very unusual art piece by none other than John Lennon!

programme.title: Beverly Hills Pawn
programme.desc: Yossi and Dominique hope to sell a tennis fanatic a tournament-used racquet signed by none other than Andre Agassi! Next, Yossi and Aria are challenged with finding the perfect jewelry accessory for a very refined client, celebrity dog Gentleman ...

programme.desc: Kirk investigates a planet with an Earth-like 1920's gangster culture.

programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a gigantic energy draining space organism that threatens the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise tracks a mysterious SOS to an ancient planet presumed long dead.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise's command crew must thwart an invasion by aliens from another galaxy who plan to conquer this one.

programme.desc: The Enterprise finds a planet devastated by disease that appears to treat the American flag with great reverence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.desc: Picard and Data return to the Enterprise to discover that the entire crew has de-evolved into prehistoric beings.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ro Laren is forced to choose between her loyalty to Picard and her hatred toward Cardassia when she accepts an assignment to infiltrate the Maquis.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Starfleet Lt. Barclay's hologram convinces Janeway to pursue a dangerous, untested plan to bring Voyager home.

programme.desc: The Doctor is torn between his duty to Voyager and his conscience when warrior holograms rebel against their Hirogen creators.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When O'Neill and Teal'c take an SGC-modified Goa'uld glider out for a test flight, they lose control and are sucked into outer space by a Goa'uld tracking device. It's up to the team to rescue them, before they run out oxygen and life support.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Daniel Jackson returns to Chicago to attend the funeral of his mentor, a celebrated archaeologist, he soon realizes that the death is mysteriously connected to the recent discovery of a 10,000-year-old Egyptian artifact that might be cursed.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to a remote interplanetary minefield to sabotage a hazardous alliance between two powerful Goa'uld System Lords. But their mission becomes far more dangerous when they realize Teal'c has been captured by one of the Lords.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SGC commander Gen. Hammond steps down saying he's too old for the job, SG-1 suspects foul play. When a hard-nosed new general steps in to replace him and splits up SG-1, they vow to solve the mystery and get their beloved General back.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A decade in the future, Earth's alliance with a highly intelligent race of aliens has rendered SGC obsolete. But when Carter, now married to an ambassador, uncovers a terrifying secret, she must reassemble SG-1 to send an urgent message to the past.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a chosen boy is brought to SGC, he sends a telepathic message, causing Daniel's personality to undergo disturbing changes. Will the rest of SG-1 be able to solve the mystery of the boy's origin before he becomes a power-hungry warmonger?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to a planet to investigate a machine that induces narcotic pleasure. But when they try to leave the planet, they are overcome with debilitating withdrawal symptoms, forcing them to stay. Can they free themselves from this addiction?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter takes a young cadet under her wing on a mission to a remote planet inhabited by unique electronic beings. But when the creatures suddenly turn aggressive, SG-1 will need the cadet's brainpower to help them escape with their lives!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 sends a probe through the Stargate, a powerful electronic impulse comes back through and hides inside SGC's computer. But when the entity suddenly jumps inside Carter's mind, SG-1 must choose between saving SGC and saving Carter's life!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a tricky situation when they join forces with androids designed to look like them in a battle against an evil Goa'uld System Lord. Can they fight alongside robotic doppelgangers, or will confusion and contradiction blur the line?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 joins forces with the Tok'ra in a final attempt to rid the universe of their mutual Goa'uld nemesis, Apophis. But their plan goes awry when a member of the team is captured and they find themselves at the mercy of their most feared enemy!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Presumed dead, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) is discovered very much alive…but still under the control of the evil Apophis (Peter Williams). Will the SG-1 team be able to rescue their friend from the clutches of Apophis or will they die trying?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is shocked when a satellite housing a stargate takes up orbit above Atlantis. When the stargate begins transmitting an energy beam, attacking the city, McKay takes a page from the Ancients and opts to sink Atlantis back into the ocean.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Atlantis starts shutting down due to a damaged power system, Rodney McKay turns off all non-essential systems. But in just 28 hours, McKay realizes the city’s shields may fail completely and its inhabitants will succumb the vacuum of space.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone uses the St. Valentine's Day Massacre to assert his power over his enemies. President Hoover takes notice, and Eliot Ness takes on Capone.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Al Capone outwits Eliot Ness, but Capone's criminal empire remains in jeopardy when the IRS plants an undercover agent in his gang.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo sets his sights on Las Vegas, but when Sam Giancana incurs the wrath of young attorney Robert F. Kennedy, The Outfit is threatened.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out, and the fate of the Outfit rests on the outcome. Joe Accardo cleans up loose ends before retiring.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Visit the creative team behind Breaking Bad. Join Emmy-winner Bryan Cranston, Vince Gilligan and the entire writing team as they divulge how they created the stories for a show that was recently named one of the best written TV series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Pay a visit to the team behind Parks & Recreation, the show that skewers small-town politics and features one of America's most energetic, comic talents. Amy Poehler and the writers delve into what it's like to be funny for a living.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Dexter, the show about a serial killer with a strict moral code. Now in its 8th and final season, get rare insights from actor Michael C. Hall and show runner, Scott Buck, and the team who brought Dexter Morgan to life.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside New Girl, the cult comedy about an adorkable girl and her three male roommates trying to make their way in the big city. Creator Liz Meriwether, actor Jake Johnson and the writing team share juicy details of their off-beat writer's room.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Join the co-creators of Game of Thrones, the hit HBO series, as they open up in a rare and candid behind-the-scenes look. In a revealing conversation, find out how Game of Thrones became the most epic television series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind the curtain of one of the scariest and most unique TV series, American Horror Story, with creators Ryan Murphy & Brad Falchuck. See these creative minds spill the secrets of their success behind "one of the greatest TV dramas ever created."

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash takes viewers behind the scandals of Scandal with creator and showrunner Shonda Rhimes, star Kerry Washington and writers Mark Wilding, Matt Byrne, Jenna Bans and Heather Mitchell as they dish about one of tv's most provocative shows.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash explores the world of comic book adaptations for TV with "The Walking Dead" Creator Robert Kirkman and "Smallville" Creators Al Gough and Miles Millar. Pop culture expert Blair Butler and TV Guide's Michael Schneider join the chat.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside the show that exposes our nation's (fictitious) dirty underbelly. "House of Cards" Showrunner Beau Willimon, star Molly Parker, writer Laura Eason and Co-Executive Producer John Mankiewicz reveal the creative process behind the hit series.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash gets a behind-the-scenes look at the groundbreaking television series "Sons of Anarchy". Creator Kurt Sutter, star Katey Sagal and Executive Producers Charles Murray and Mike Daniels reveal the inner workings behind FX's biggest hit.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Jim Rash joins Creators Robert and Michelle King, star Julianna Margulies and Executive Producer Ted Humphrey to discuss "The Good Wife." From the hottest sex scenes to celebrity guests, get an exclusive glimpse into the creative process.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Showrunners I. Marlene King, Oliver Goldstick and Joseph Dougherty along with stars Shay Mitchell and Sasha Pieterse spill the dirt (including some spoilers) on the "Pretty Little Liars" creative process with never-before-told secrets from the set.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: An accident at sea cripples a Royal Navy expedition 200 miles from finding the Northwest Passage, forcing its captains to make a dire choice.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After a long winter trapped in the ice, scouting parties are sent out in search of open water. One of the teams makes a frightening discovery.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With something now stalking the ships, the captains debate their options, testing their loyalty to one another against their duty to their crews.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline at Versailles
programme.desc: While touring Versailles with Miss Clavel and the girls, Pepito disobeys a Do Not Touch sign, and leaves fingerprints of mud and chocolate on a priceless harpsichord.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline's Manners

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the New Girl

programme.desc: While touring Lord Cucuface's perfume factory in Grasse, Pepito finds a friendly skunk, which he sneaks into the factory.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and Santa

programme.desc: When Genevieve wakes up with a strange rash, Dr. Fleabag the vet prescribes lots of loving care, which Genevieve enjoy so much that she begins to fake ailments.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Magic Show

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Can Can Cliques
programme.desc: The girls enter a cancan competition, but the intense practice schedule and concerns about costumes creates a problem: cliques.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Traveling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town, where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids are prevented from taking the "easy way" into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city from invasion.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A series of short stories, highlighting different characters and their individual adventures in the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet, but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng the Dai Li when they attempt to show the Earth King the vast conspiracy taking place in his city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula tiene que dejar a Juan por exigencia de José, todo para mantenerse al lado del hombre que ama, pero lejos de su corazón. Julieta sabe que llegó la hora de su venganza. Sofía llega a la casa de los Millán.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: El odio de Julieta la está llevando a la locura, y en su sed de venganza contra Paula comienza a perder el juicio tratando de suplantarla. Juan se da cuenta de sus mentiras y, al rechazarla, provoca en ella una reacción violenta llena de rencor.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le tiende una trampa a José y le devuelve su chantaje con un video que desenmascara sus ambiciosas intenciones frente a sus hermanos. Paula le pide a Sofía que resguarde la evidencia. Beatriz organiza la despedida de soltera para Guadalupe.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Llega el día del matrimonio de Guadalupe y Gaspar, al que se espera que asista Eleuterio. Paula arriesga su amor por Juan para salvar a su madre de la cárcel, pero él empieza a sospechar que José está detrás del rechazo de la mujer que ama.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.desc: Things get slimy at a fishy challenge in Tangiers. Morocco.

programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.
